relations.note: These define the overall visual appearance and structure of the chart panel.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Establish consistent, recognizable panels for clinical data representation.
rules.rule_text: Chart and infographic containers must use uniform rounded corners (radius.infographic.panel = 12px), a Light Blue background (color.tertiary.light_blue = #E6F0F9), and a Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) rounded header bar.

quotes: Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.

rules.intent: Maintain strict graphical hierarchy and brand integrity in scientific/efficacy data visualizer layouts.
rules.rule_text: Charts must use Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) and Sky Blue (color.secondary.sky_blue = #358CCB) as the dominant colors. Sunshine (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) and Gold (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) are exclusively reserved for emphasizing key figures and data points. Placebo or comparator elements must use a neutral gray.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Soften clinical data visualizers to align with the approachable brand archetype.
rules.rule_text: Bars and chart icons must feature rounded, approachable shapes, specifically requiring rounded bar tops.

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Maintain uniform headline styling and structural separation on data-heavy layouts.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines must use the Nunito Sans Bold+ font stack for emails (font.family.nunito_sans, weight.nunito_sans.800), styled in Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) and ALL CAPS (case.campaign.headline = all_caps), with a thin Gold rule (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) rendered beneath.

quotes: Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.

rules.intent: Ensure visual hierarchy immediately pulls the eye to clinical results.
rules.rule_text: In statistical callouts, key figures (e.g., percentages) must be formatted as the hero element (large and bold), with supporting descriptive text arranged in a lighter weight directly beneath.

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Maintain data legibility and isolate secondary informational disclosures.
rules.rule_text: Footnotes must be significantly smaller and clearly structurally separated from primary clinical/statistical data.
